reviews.review_description: I love Star Trek and thought that this game would be fun. It was for the first couple of months that I played it. Now, it glitches as soon as you start a mission. You lose everything around you, and what remains is frozen. I would request a refund, but...looks like they got me for $30. Very disappointed. I own a game that I can't play.

I wrote a review a while back, but this will overwrite that one.  

Long story short, I would get kicked frequently and the game was unplayable when I first got this game on sale several months ago. Since then, I moved my Internet router about 5 feet from my VR headset, and I have not had any disconnects since I’ve done that.  Also to add, I did upgrade my Internet to the best money you can buy.

So, the combination of the better Internet, and the proximity to the router has definitely made the game worthwhile to play!  I’m actually enjoying this game quite a bit now.  For those of you that are getting disconnected, move your Wi-Fi connection close to your headset. ￼I don’t know if you need top Internet speeds to play it, but I did play for two hours straight with no disconnects and I had a lot of fun!

The game is good on solo missions but playing with friends is much much more amazing. Traveling round space on different starships is over all a great setting. We definitely need this back in the store.

This is an amazing game and if you have friends, you should play it! That being said, the game has not been updated in years. And due to that the player base has wound down to almost nothing. But if you can get through it, there’s anywhere between 50 to 100 hours worth of content.
I love getting a chance to dive into the Star Trek universe. I hope this game returns to the store because I want to buy it for my Brother as well.

￼ What I would like to see
While in the game, Star Trek Bridge crew why not make it were the players whether it be at Helms ￼ or other stations ￼ask the captain or have in the menu where you can ask for time off or maybe it’s the ￼end of your ￼shift.
 and you could get up from your position and go to 10 forward or somewhere else on the ship while another player takes your position at Helms because they’re waiting on the sideline for an opening to join the game, Also, it would be nice If while playing the game during a ￼ missions you could beam down to the planet.
Players can be waiting in 10 forward or maybe in a Hollow deck enjoying other aspects of the game.
Well, also getting to know each other and talk about the game and the next mission. ￼￼

This is hand down the best star trek game ever created. If you say otherwise obviously you don’t enjoy being a Union officer. I only wish i had friends who enjoy this type of game. Multiplayer is best with friends.

I have the quest 3 with a broadband connection and it runs smoothly. If you're a Trek fan and want to be part of a bridge crew it's crazy fun and really cool. I've only done single player so far but for that alone it's worth it to me. There's a little bit of a learning curve but lot of it is intuitive. 

What would make this epic is if you could talk to a AI npc lol. Someday soon perhaps. 

Once I know the stations well enough I'll try multiplayer. 

Note: once you connect to ubersolf you have to restart the game. 👃

I was afraid of the reviews, but so far on the quest 3 it seems to work fine for the most part. I suspect multiplayer doesn’t work? I bought if for single player anyways. It’s pretty cool, though it could have been so much more also. It’s a shame no one has taken this concept to do something like this again and not abandon it. 

Either way, if you pick it up on sale you can’t go wrong. I’m really enjoying it so far.

Edit: just tried multiplayer, there is some bug: but still super fun. I did lose connection once also.

Ignore the whingers with their 1 star reviews!
Works on quest 3 perfectly, if it doesn't you then that's something that you're doing wrong. The account linking is quick and easy, provided you can follow clear and basic instructions. Once you have logged in, CLOSE THE GAME AND RELAUNCH It!! Rocket science, I know. And the guy who gave 1 star because his friend wanted to try it and had to buy it? Yeah, you know that's how games work? Like, how they make their money? Honestly, most of the 1 star reviews for this game are just ridiculous. 
This game is exactly what I hoped it would be; a way to live out my lifelong fantasy of being on the bridge of a starship. Do I recommend getting fully into the roleplay and giving the ai crew verbal orders while pushing the buttons that make them actually do things? Yes, yes I do.

In my opinion for 8.99 it's a good buy, however, reading the reviews I was very sceptical about purchasing it (at full price).
The game itself, it's clean, clear and somewhat entertaining.
However, twice during the training episode it has crashed, I am using the 3S, not sure if this is relevant. 
Personally, this has potential if they can stabilise the game play and invest in multiplayer, which would bring this type of gaming into another dimension, such as multiple starships against enemies.
But not holding my breath.
If the developers could just stabilise game play, that would be a start.

People will pay for takeout that they finish in 30 minutes and leave a positive review, but when it comes to games that they can spend years enjoying (and devs spend years creating) they leave 1 star reviews for the dumbest reasons. If you enjoy a game even a little, give it 5 stars. If you don't enjoy it refund it, or email the devs and express your concerns. Once a game's stars drops too low, sales stop, and there's no incentive to ever add fixes. To pay their bills, it's better for devs to just move on to the next game. Rant over.

This game is awesome on Quest 3. The Ubisoft setup is a small pain that takes less than 5 minutes to sort out (had to login twice, and restart the game). This game comes with the Next Generation DLC for free. I don't play multiplayer so can't say much about that. I'm the captain now!
I created an Ubisoft account and they won’t connect. Therefore I could not even start past the loading page.

When I try to play it says I must connect my account. 
When I connect my account and click “done” it say I must connect my account. 

Beware, this is completely unusable for me and $30 that is pretty much tossed in the trash for absolutely nothing in return. 
DO NOT BUY!

This game used to work great a couple of years ago. Very buggy now, tons of glitches. Can't get through a game in multiplayer without either a microphone not working, or you become invisible, lots of problems, they need to update & fix this. Quite a few of my friends have lost money with this game..Also, very hard to invite a friend in multiplayer mode.

reviews.review_title: Let me tell you(5 to 1 real quick)
reviews.review_description:
(NEW NEWS( AFTER I FOUND OUT HOW MONEY  HUNGRY THEY ARE THEY ARE SICK. WHAT I MEAN MY BROTHER WANTED TO TRY IT SO GETS ON HIS ACCOUNT AND GUESS WHAT THEY WANT YOU TO PAY30$ AGAIN.... YEAH F THAT COMPANY AND THIS GAME. THAT'S ENOUGH TO NEVER DO BUSINESS WITH THEM AGAIN.)


(OLD NEWS(This game is absolutely amazing I mean amazing creature little account very easy to do being captain and controlling spaceship is insane I'm not even a Star Trek fan but I love this game I bought it when I was on sale so definitely worth it I think it's worth the 30 I'll give you 6 stars if I could. It definitely deserves a better rate and then it has definitely underrated.)

reviews.review_title: Don’t waste your money.creator fix game
reviews.review_description: This game has great potential if only the creators would pay attention to it customer reviews. Creators this game has too many glitches it freezes up have only been able to play for fifteen minutes or less since we bought this. We want to play this game creators stop taking peoples money until you fix the game
Tried on quest 2 and now 3 with no success apparently Ubisoft does not support it any more. SO WHY IS IT AVAILABLE STILL TO BUY ARRRGGHH

Nice game for Star Trek fans,
but don't buy this game if you want to play in friends/private mode, it's NOT working!
I am not going to contact the dev's because there are plenty of complaints about this subject and NO solution.(look on the internet).
Why should they care?
They have your money.

Cannot play multiplayer when you find a party.

Extremely small player base.

Toxic players will boot you if you “Haven’t played a lot”.

Spent 15 days trying to get to experience the game in multiplayer. 14 days is the cut off for refunds. This developer took my money even though they know the software won’t run on a quest 3. 

Overall, awful experience.
I did not receive any of the TNG content, nor any TOS and can’t find any DLC or ways to download it!! Come on guys! That sucks
Doesn’t work keep logging into Ubisoft account but just sends me around in a circle steer well clear. Don’t buy if you have get a refund straight away.

Well, the force is definitely with me today. I had this game for a couple of weeks, and it always crashed.  Finally, I linked my ubisoft account and am ready to go forth.

Live long and prosper

reviews.review_title: What I want out of VR
reviews.review_description:
I see lots of other reviews of people who have a lot of trouble getting the game started. I had no issues with it, it requires an Ubisoft account but once mine was set up it never was an issue again.

I absolutely love the idea of commanding something, be it space ship or submarine or whatnot, and this game is literally exactly why I want out of VR. I put it down for years and just picked it up again and am having so much fun with it. If you ever dreamed of being a captain of a ship, play this in solo adventure mode. Absolutely amazing fun.

reviews.review_title: Great game don't want to put it down
reviews.review_description:
I bought this game yesterday and I read the reviews so made sure I created a ubisoft account before I logged in on the meta quest and was able to sign in straight away then with no issues!

This is a  very full on game and I love it and definitely will be getting the next generation dlc i hope one day they will add more ships like the defiant or discovery or evan the option to play as klingon or romulan I havnt yet tested the play with friends option but will update when I do :)

 I look forward to what the future holds for this game
When I connect to my account, it says I still have to connect and I keep trying over and over and it still does nothing. I didn’t even get to try the game. This is a rip off. I want my money back.

reviews.review_title: I love the thrill of commanding the ship
reviews.review_description: I love this game on Quest 3. It's awesome to sit in the captains chair.

I was hesitant because of the reviews.
They are unfounded, the game works perfect for me on my Quest3.

No log in issues, just create your Ubisoft account in advance and link it on your first run of the game. 

I am thoroughly enjoying being captain!

This is fantastic, but my brother and I on Quest 3s often gets stuck (game freezes up in a way. Ship dont move, cant select anything etc. So many missions just freeze up then we fail. Wish they do update fixes and kickstart this again. C'mon. Do you guys know the huge Starfleet Academy (which anyone can join in real life) numbers of people who would love to then actually play this.

It's virtually impossible to connect with friends using multiplayer. You have to make the multiplayer game public, have your friends join a random server, and hopefully you connect to the 1 your friend made. You start playing together, but then encounter many bugs. You can't move the ship, you start seeing the ship on screen and can't switch to straight ahead view. The game disconnects you, and you have to restart the server, because joining a friend's game doesn't work.

When installing this game it had the making of brilliant experience, synced to my Ubisoft account and then loaded the game, sadly that is where it took a bit of annoying end. The controls on the game are not functional, there no way of controlling them and it was to be honest a waste of time, just pleased I got it on sale and not at full price. Note to Meta: if you are going to put something on your marketplace l, do some testing of it first instead of wasting people’s time and money. Not happy.

reviews.review_title: Works just fine on a Meta Quest 3
reviews.review_description:
I was thrilled to be able to install this game again after not having it since the Sony VR1 model. Yes, it IS annoying to have to login to the Ubisoft club, but it's REALLY not that big of a deal. You link some accounts, login and then (most importantly) CLOSE the game.

Reopen it and you're good to go. No different than it was for Sony.

I absolutely love star trek and the game is done well and looks great but to play with my friends online is epic but we can't even finish a mission without one of us glitching out ! Very disappointing! I wish they would update it to fix that cause it would be amazing with the glitches fixed !!

The game needs bug fixes. I am using 3s and multiplayer mode has glitches. Microphone cuts out, consoles info different than the other crew, etc. Solo missions work great! Please update so I can live my dream.

reviews.review_title: A must have for any Star Trek fan
reviews.review_description: This game is great. Very well made, looks great, and is a blast to be in control of a starship’s bridge. Missions are exciting and fun not to hard but not to easy. I have not tried multiplayer yet but will mess with it soon and update my review.

I had no problem getting the game working. I had to reset my ubi password but after that started playing. I thought there was issues with the game saving progress but realized you had to choose the next mission lol. Bought it on sale so totally worth it. Haven't played multiplayer yet I want to get more familiar with it before I do. Totally recommend it. I'm playing on a 3S.

reviews.review_title: I can’t get it to start.
reviews.review_description: I get into the start screen and it says I need to be logged in to Ubisoft. It does not give me any options to do that. I can’t not move past that screen. Just going round and round in circles.

Boring, tedious, underwhelming, boring

Don't buy this

I already owned for the oculus rift with we all know was a massive flop. I was forced to purchase the game again. I even emailed explained with proof I already owned. Didn't care just wanted my money. I reluctantly bought thd game again. I hate you
So boring. Absolutely disappointed.

reviews.review_title: Great! But how to log in…?
reviews.review_description:
I have this game on my Quest for years now. I love the vibe and simplicity. But please help me to allow access to my son too. I recently gifted him a copy of the game and he simply cannot login! An email to Ubisoft goes unanswered. Please assist…
Also, the multiplayer synchronisation is horribly unstable. When I see a Klingon battle cruiser ahead of me, my helmsman sees the same cruiser behind us. This way the game is unplayable.

reviews.review_title: great fun on sale for single player
reviews.review_description:
im giving this a nice review to boost the ratings.   but bear in mind i got it on sale and i would highly recommend waiting till its on sale.

if your  a star trek fan this is fun for single player i hear it has multiplayer issues but you can play it solo with ai crew for 12 bucks on sale its not a bad deal at all
as others have said when you sign up/in with ubisoft and its connected
restart the game and you should be able to log in.

if you can grab it on sale for like 12 bucks like i did
def worth a try!
But unfortunately this game remains virtually unplayable for quest 2 with all the glitches￼

I bought the game, and it works perfectly!
I think many people forget to fully set up their Ubisoft account, especially confirming their email address. I also had issues until I confirmed my email address.
Now the game starts as it should!
Steps:
1.	Install the game.
2.	Create a Ubisoft account.
3.	Confirm your email address with Ubisoft.
4.	Restart the game.
5.	Go where no one has gone before!

Disclaimer: This solution worked for me, but it may not resolve the issues you are experiencing. If you’re encountering any issues.
Before you can use this app, you are forced to set up a Unisoft account. Even if you do this, you are put into a loop of continuously logging in & once you have, it asks you to do it again.

Ok, so for the newbs if you're a gamer, ubisolf is easy to start
 or login inn. All you need to follow the steps and then link the account to the browser and reboot the game and enjoy the game control as captain.

I don’t understand majority of the bad reviews saying the game doesn’t work. It works perfectly fine for me and I’m having no issue in losing my campaign progress like a lot of other people are saying. I put off buying this for the longest time because of those reviews and now I see they are unfounded. Ubisoft account linked fine, you just have to close out the game and restart it after you link it because for some reason it gets stuck when the initial link is made. Only reason I give this a 4 star is because the multiplayer is practically non-existent. It’s a shame because I played it when it first came out on the PSVR and it was an absolute blast with other people. It’s still an excellent Star Trek experience in solo mode (especially when using Enterprise D 🤩). I’m very glad I made the purchase on here because now I can play wherever I want and be the starship captain I’ve always wanted to be! ENGAGE!
If you like Star Trek this is a game for you , I love the fact you can play TOS Next Generation or your own original ship. Definitely fun .
I’ve had this for over a year and still can’t play.

I’ve had no issues with the game unlike a lot of people users. I find it a very enjoyable experience. The missions 
could be a bit more complex though.

An absolute must for a trek fan. Commanding the Enterprise D in randomly generated missions is just brilliant. Even the "new" ship is great fun to play around with. 
Not had any problems with initial setup or saves etc. P

You buy the game, which forces you to set up another account which you really don't want, but after going through the hassle of setting it up, the app still doesn't recognize you have an account. If you make it a requirement, maybe provide some instructions on how to link it with your application so people aren't wasting $30. So far, it just feels like a scam. I do wish I could play it.

reviews.review_title: Works, just have to create a Ubisoft....
reviews.review_description:
Create a Ubisoft account first, then link it in the game on the headset.
I did have to quit and re enter the game after linking my account, but besides that it has worked fine.

I had no problem linking to the ubi account and the game runs great on Quest 3. Missions are fun and a good buy for the price. I have only played solo so can't comment on multi player aspects of the game but if you like space games and sims then you should at least consider giving this game a try. getting the Next generation update is a nice bonus.
Bought the game on sale great game just trying to find the dlc for the original and next generation enterprise but struggling to find it anyone finds it let me know but really good game

So after much hemming and hawing about buying this game after seeing the negative reviews and getting a 30% discount for being a metaquest plus member, I got it for around $20. ( if you're not a metaquest plus subscriber you're missing the boat. 2 new free games per month plus full use of the existing library for $60 a year is a steal) I'm not a huge fan of multi-player games because it's typically a bunch of young kids running around acting the fool so my review has nothing to do with the multiplayer aspect because I've only played solo. As far as that goes? This is by far a 5* experience. As far as the loading / connection issues people are complaining about I have not encountered issues wity either connection or downloads so you guys need to check your home connection or equipment because it works fine for me.  It is very realistic. It's not just point and shoot. It's coordinating with all the ship's systems and control centers in order to complete missions. It's a super steep learning curve and I'm still learning things every time I play but if you're looking for a simulation of what it might be like to be on the bridge of a Star Trek genre star ship this is it. Don't expect to dive right in and start shooting up Klingons because in order to just get from one place to another you'll need to master coordinating between engineering and the helm to plot courses, allocate power to the different ship systems and then some. I'm not certain why anyone who is truly a fan of Star Trek wouldn't like this game. It's definitely not a hit the ground running game but it is realistic. Again? I cannot speak to the multi player aspect of it but as far as the PvE aspect? It's amazing.
Live long and prosper!

Update: So I mentioned in my above review that I couldn't speak for multi-player mode. I since have played multi-player and it's actually pretty awesome too! You'll definitely hook up with Trekkies from all over on multi-player. I didn't experience the "brat attack" I was concerned about above because pretty much all the people you hook up with are at least casual fans of Star Trek. The only negative thing I can say about multi-player is that it does take a bit of time to get a team to gather. I suspect that's because so many people are scared off by the bad reviews there just aren't that many people playing the game. I give the multi-player aspect 5 stars as well with the cavieat that you may have a pretty extended wait to get a team together but that's no fault of the game. Hopefully people will read my review and add to the community. As I said above, this game is a awesome for even the casual Star Trek enthusiasts and a must have for the true Trekkies.
The game refused to load! I spent money on it 🤨
Toke me a bit to get the hang of it but it's a really good game

reviews.review_title: Much better than the current score!
reviews.review_description:
I had this game on my wishlist for a loooong time and finally got it during the Meta Connect sale. Even though it’s a bit annoying to be forced to create an UbiSoft account, and the game requiring to connect to servers then I’m giving this the 5 stars it deserves.

I mean you get to pilot Star Trek space ships and command the crew like a boss. The missions feel very StarTreky, just like the old TV shows and it’s all very well made. I’m very happy with the game and think the single player is a blast! I haven’t even tried multiplayer but don’t really care if its working or not. 
Awesome game and I beg to the devs to please never abandon this as this will be a retro game that I will want to play even 20 years into the future.
It’s Star Trek in VR. Hello!

So after having the quest for a few months and wanting this game but been put off by the reviews I finally decided to grab it in the sale for £8.99 and I’m glad I did. Yes you have to set up an account with an email not an issue. Single player works fine no issues multiplayer I host a room only one joined needed three. I don’t know why all the bad reviews probably Star Wars fans

- singleplayer works fine
- haven't tried multiplayer
- Enterprise from TNG included!
- graphics could be better on Quest 3
So much fun if you can get a game started.

So I got this game when I first got my quest to when it was still Oculus. I love this game. I never played the multiplayer, I only did the campaign and ongoing missions. I love flying my Aegis! It is my go-to ship, if I'm watching TNG and I want to just be fully immersed then I switch to next generation, and I hardly ever use the original series ship. I love this game and I play it all the time. I still record videos and post them to social media, there is nothing like being a starship captain! Five stars. I only wish they would add more campaigns!
Game is great multiplayer is clunky with weak internet. Doesnt work at all.. Works well otherwise. Make sure to be on dedicated wifi and full reception.  Multitasking.adventure....

If you are a Star Trek fan, I 999% recommend this game, as it allows you to operate instrument panels on the bridge of the ships from Star Trek, and even go on missions! There are research missions, patrol missions, even borg resistance missions, and more! Indeed, the multiplayer is bugged, but nothing as bad as everyone seems to believe. There are minor issues, such as the controls on the ship being unresponsive during an online match, but that occurs very rarely! And it's also been the absolute worst issue I've encountered in this game so far. The real issue with multiplayer is that no one ever plays this game anymore, so the lobby is always empty. I remember being able to join and immediately find several players in the lobby, but this game died so quickly, before I knew it, I was all alone! Please come play with me!

I love this game. Its perfect for any star Trek fan or any space fan. Or anyone in general 😅. The only problem is the match making. Not many people play the game so there aren't many matches. But if more people played it 10/10💯💯💯✅✅
But would be better if more people played it.but it’s a good game for the average Star Trek fan
Underrated. Shame folks couldn't get into it. If anyone still playing Add me need crew members lol

reviews.review_title: Great game more of the games
reviews.review_description: This is a very good game as you have to learn about how to work out the mission and work alone or with a team I whis that they were more star trek games on vr some to buy a some free one

I love this game! I am a huge fan of star trek. Been watching it since i was 7.  Just like any good game, there is a learning curve involved as well as a little patients being needed. Once you get past that, it is very enjoyable. The only problem i have is the command chair controls. But that is a me issue. I have to play the game in a different chair as the controls cant be reached in my recliner. I hope one day the come out with one that is the Klingon Bridge Commander and be able to go head to head. I just upgraded to the Quest 3. It should be delivered by tomorrow or Tuesday.

It’s a great game I love the graphics and features that is gives you. The game works just fine unlike other reviewers but I get that was a few months ago. I love this game and can’t wait to play with other people
Perfect first game breaking into a new console market. I look forward to possibly adding more content or a follow up sequel.

reviews.review_title: Game works you guys are morons !!!
reviews.review_description: Just like the title I posted says this game works gave me no problems I think the problem you guys are having is you don't have any patience and or can't read I already had an account so all I had to do is reset my password and boom reset the game and I'm in....played online with some random people after doing the tutorial I'm a big fan of star trek I use to stay up late night watching tng ds9 and voyager.....so this makes me feel right at home...awesome game

reviews.review_title: Star Trek bridge crew add on
reviews.review_description: You should consider adding on the Discovery ship and missions from Star Trek Discovery show.

reviews.review_title: Don't buy if you aren't patient or smart
reviews.review_description: Look, this game is absolutely worth it if you are both patient and smart enough. Most of the other reviews are coming from people who both have no idea what they are doing and don't have the patience for it. It's not the game's fault. It also seems that it was made for the Quest 2 and 1. There hasn't been an update for the 3 yet. This game has more details, in both gameplay and graphics, than anything else I have played. It's worth it.

reviews.review_title: Working fine on Quest 1 so far
reviews.review_description: I did have a minor issue linking my Ubisoft account: after linking, the game kept asking me to do it again. I rebooted my Quest, restarted the game, and everything's been smooth sailing since 🖖
I cannot, for the life of me, understand all of the negative reviews.  I purchased the game today and spent three hours immersed in Star Trek awesomeness.  I can hardly wait to hop back in tomorrow!
If your a Trekkie then your love it :)

I'm genuinely perplexed by any negative reviews for Star Trek Bridge Crew VR because, in my personal experience, the game not only functions flawlessly but also boasts stunning visuals. Even in solo mode, the enjoyment factor remains exceptional. The missions provided are not only great but also present a consistent challenge, adding to the overall thrill.

What truly sets this game apart is its dynamic mission system powered by AI, ensuring that each playthrough offers a unique and engaging experience. With a choice of three distinct ships, each operating in a completely different manner, the variety and depth of gameplay are truly commendable.

For me, playing Star Trek Bridge Crew VR felt like an awe-inspiring journey at the helm of a genuine starship. I wholeheartedly recommend this game to anyone with a penchant for commanding spaceships – it's an awesome experience that captures the essence of interstellar exploration in a way that few games achieve.
